## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the change (failing test written first where it made sense).
- [ ] `npm run ci` passes locally (typecheck, lint, build, coverage, smoke).
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or settings changed.
- [ ] No secrets or real credentials are included.
